languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: "Нунциус — мой дражайший коллега, почтенный Астартес. Он незаменим и его вклад в наши совместные поиски совершенно неоценим. Его утрату я бы сравнил с потерей части себя. Это неопровержимый факт".

"Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус — мой дражайший коллега, почтенный Астартес. Он незаменим и его вклад в наши совместные поиски совершенно неоценим. Его утрату я бы сравнил с потерей части себя. Это неопровержимый факт".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

"Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: «Nuncius es mi querido colega, noble Astartes. Es irremplazable y su contribución a nuestros esfuerzos conjuntos tiene un valor totalmente incalculable. Su pérdida sería equivalente a perder una parte de mí mismo. Esto es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius es mi querido colega, noble Astartes. Es irremplazable y su contribución a nuestros esfuerzos conjuntos tiene un valor totalmente incalculable. Su pérdida sería equivalente a perder una parte de mí mismo. Esto es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスは我が親愛なる同僚です、高貴なるアスタルテスよ。彼はかけがえのない存在であり、我々の共同事業への貢献はまったく計り知れません。彼を失うことは、私自身の一部を失うことに等しいでしょう。これは議論の余地のない事実です」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスは我が親愛なる同僚です、高貴なるアスタルテスよ。彼はかけがえのない存在であり、我々の共同事業への貢献はまったく計り知れません。彼を失うことは、私自身の一部を失うことに等しいでしょう。これは議論の余地のない事実です」

languages.text: “尊贵的阿斯塔特，努恩修斯是我最亲爱的同僚。他无可替代，对我们共同事业的贡献更是无价。失去他就如同失去我自己的一部分。这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “尊贵的阿斯塔特，努恩修斯是我最亲爱的同僚。他无可替代，对我们共同事业的贡献更是无价。失去他就如同失去我自己的一部分。这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: "Nuncius ist mein geschätzter Kollege, edler Astartes. Er ist nicht zu ersetzen und seine Beiträge zu unseren gemeinsamen Forschungen sind unbezahlbar. Sein Verlust kämme dem Verlust eines Teils von mir gleich. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius ist mein geschätzter Kollege, edler Astartes. Er ist nicht zu ersetzen und seine Beiträge zu unseren gemeinsamen Forschungen sind unbezahlbar. Sein Verlust kämme dem Verlust eines Teils von mir gleich. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Nuncius est mon collègue le plus cher, noble guerrier de l'Astartes. Il est irremplaçable, et sa contribution à notre entreprise commune est inestimable. Le perdre équivaudrait à perdre une partie de moi-même. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius est mon collègue le plus cher, noble guerrier de l'Astartes. Il est irremplaçable, et sa contribution à notre entreprise commune est inestimable. Le perdre équivaudrait à perdre une partie de moi-même. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: "Nuncius benim en değerli meslektaşımdır soylu Astartes. Onun yeri doldurulamaz ve ortak çabamıza katkısı kesinlikle paha biçilemez. Onu kaybetmek, kendimden bir parça kaybetmek gibi olurdu. Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius is my dearest colleague, noble Astartes. He is irreplaceable and his contribution to our joint endeavour is utterly invaluable. His loss would be akin to losing a part of myself. This is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius benim en değerli meslektaşımdır soylu Astartes. Onun yeri doldurulamaz ve ortak çabamıza katkısı kesinlikle paha biçilemez. Onu kaybetmek, kendimden bir parça kaybetmek gibi olurdu. Bu inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."
